contract_verification.impl_site: ActionBar.handleSave catch: msg.toLowerCase().includes('quota') -> 'Error: Storage limit exceeded.'

non_blocking_findings: ActionBar.notify schedules setTimeout per call without clearing prior — fast double-click can leave stale toast briefly. Not in any current Test-ID; track as polish.
persistenceService tests mock localforage as named exports while real module exposes default; works because saveModel uses named-style access. Note for maintainers.
